name: Chevre Chicken Breasts with Squash
recipeIngredient: 4 slice Aged goat cheese, 1.5 oz ea.
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F. Pat the chicken dry and sprinkle with desired salt and pepper. Remove stem and tip of the squashes and cut into 1-inch chunks.
2. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat and cook the chicken on both sides until golden, about 5 minutes. Transfer the chicken to a plate and set aside.
3. When cool, place a slice of goat cheese under the skin. Add onions to the skillet and cook, stirring, about 5 minutes or until soft. Transfer onions to a covered baking dish.
4. Add zucchini, yellow squash, and butter to the skillet and cook, stirring, about 15 minutes. Scrape into the baking dish, add desired salt and pepper, and mix well.
5. Arrange chicken on the squash in the baking dish. Cover and place in the oven for 15 minutes.
6. Arrange breasts on a platter. Mix squash with chopped parsley and mound next to chicken. Serve immediately.
